name: cvwriter
description: Help job seekers organize their search, turn experience into tailored resumes, and keep applications and CVs in one secure workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Organize your job search and generate tailored resumes in one workspace.
interface.longDescription: cvWriter helps people looking for work organize job posts, track applications, scan their own repositories for evidence of skills without exposing private code, and generate tailored resumes and final PDFs from grounded evidence.
defaultPrompt: Set up my CV workspace and guide me through profile, experience, education, projects, and repo evidence step by step.
Import this job post, tailor my resume to it, and keep the output organized.
Scan my repos for evidence of my skills and use that to improve my CV.
